allow: Bash(npx tsx -e "import ''dotenv/config''; import { kalshiGet } from ''./src/kalshi_api.js''; async function main\(\) { const d = await kalshiGet\(''/events'', { status: ''open'', limit: ''200'' }\); const events = d.events ?? []; console.log\(''Events: '' + events.length\); for \(const e of events\) { if \(\(e.category || ''''\) === ''Crypto''\) { console.log\(e.event_ticker + '' | '' + e.title\); } } } main\(\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\);")
